source_intent.raw_intent: Case 097: I am a student_builder in East Asia. Build a compliance_evidence_prompt for sales_offer using the memory_lens. Chaos input type is multi_runtime_confusion. The source is intentionally messy: mix missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria. Produce a governed artifact with explicit validation gates. Return something SR8 can compile into objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract.

parsed_tester_json.compiled_intent: Objective: Generate a compliance_evidence_prompt for a sales_offer using the memory_lens, ensuring all regulatory and policy constraints are met despite ambiguous input. Scope: - East Asia student_builder context; sales_offer compliance evidence; memory_lens integration; multi_runtime_confusion chaos input. Constraints: - Must resolve missing context and ambiguous acceptance criteria from raw_intent. - Must include explicit validation gates for source policy and claim limits. - Must produce SR8-compilable output with objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract. - Must handle urgent language without compromising governance. Success Criteria: - Compliance evidence prompt is fully governed and auditable. - All validation gates are explicitly defined and testable. - Output contract is complete and SR8-compilable. Output Contract: - artifact_type: compliance_evidence_prompt - depth_tier: D3_SOVEREIGN_CORE - runtime_target: Codex - sections: source_policy_limits; claim_validation_gates; memory_lens_integration; acceptance_criteria_resolution; governance_audit_trail - validation_focus: source_policy_and_claim_limits
